use_cases: Designer portfolio landing page with split-screen layout
Personal branding showcase with dark/light mode toggle
Portfolio page featuring paper shader visual effects
ai_summary: A portfolio hero section featuring a split-screen layout with paper shader dithering effects and a dark/light mode toggle. Uses monospace typography to display designer credentials, professional experience, and skills in a minimalist CV-style presentation. The component combines visual shader effects with interactive theme switching for a distinctive portfolio landing experience.
